violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. Raw chicken stored next to ready to eat items in sliding door cooler in kitchen. Raw beef stored next to ready to eat items in 2 door cooler in storage area.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. Residential style stove/oven not located under hood.
General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. Moisture damaged cabinets at service station.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Upright freezer in storage area needs to be defrosted.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in the proper location to protect from contamination. Store refuse cans away from food service storage spaces/shelving.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors need sweeping in dry storage areas. Floor in walk in cooler needs to be mopped. Water pooling at ice machine.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Laminate flooring in service station and behind bar curling/peeling where water damage is occurring.

General premises. — --Opening to outside or portion of building that is not part of the food establishment, was not protected against the entry of insects and rodents. North and North East entry doors not provided with self closing mechanisms.
General food protection. — --Potentially hazardous food, pecan pie slices, were not stored at proper temperature of 40 degrees or below.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Store container of au jus and box of raw ground beef off floor in walk in cooler.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. Container of raw chicken stored next to ready to eat items in sliding door cooler in kitchen. Raw ground beef stored next to bag of carrots, ham, and boxes of cheeses in 2 door reach in cooler in storage room near walk in cooler.

Cooling of potentially hazardous food. — --Cooked potentially hazardous food was not cooled properly from 70F to 41F or below within four hours. Closed 3 gallon plastic container of beef barley soup stored on floor at 43 degrees F in walk in cooler. Prepared on 10/21/25. Discard soup.

Variance requirement for specialized processing methods. — --Food establishment did not obtain approved variance or HACCP plan from regulatory authority for special process of vacuum sealing of raw meats.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. Residential style stove/oven not located under hood.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. Seal bare wood surfaces to kitchen shelving. Shelving edges and worn shelving needs to be sealed.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. General cleaning needed to cooking equipment & reach in coolers/freezers.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. General cleaning needed to kitchen equipment, storage shelving, and cabinets in kitchen and service areas.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Hood system needs cleaning.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Do not store single service items in water damaged cabinets at service station.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors need cleaning throughout facility.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Floor tiles buckling in areas. Carpeting matted and uncleanable near service station.
Proper storage, no-reuse (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Approved, safe, unadulterated, approved additives, proper receiving temperature (4 pts deducted)
Bare hand contact avoided, single- use gloves, and utensils used (3 pts deducted)
Prevented, separated, segregated (5 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
